check.command: show running-config | include "^ ip verify unicast source reachable-via any$"

candidate_check.description: The Cisco PE switch must be configured with Unicast Reverse Path Forwarding (uRPF) loose mode enabled on all CE-facing interfaces.

expected.substring: ip verify unicast source reachable-via any

check_content_excerpt:
Review the switch configuration to determine if uRPF loose mode is enabled on all CE-facing interfaces.

interface Ethernet1/2
 ip address x.1.12.2/30
 ip access-group BLOCK_TO_CORE in
 ip verify unicast source reachable-via any

If uRPF loose mode is not enabled on all CE-facing interfaces, this is a finding.

expected_values.substring: ip verify unicast source reachable-via any

fix_text_excerpt:
Configure uRPF loose mode on all CE-facing interfaces as shown in the example below:

SW1(config)# int e1/2
SW1(config-if)# ip verify unicast source reachable-via any
SW1(config-if)# end
title: The Cisco PE switch must be configured with Unicast Reverse Path Forwarding (uRPF) loose mode enabled on all CE-facing interfaces.
